channel.title: STRIXEVO
channel.description: Sim racing, PC optimization, and self-hosting — guides, build logs, and configs.

item.title: What a Real Design Review Changed on My Website
item.description: What an external design review changed on STRIXEVO, from the visuals to the deployment workflow behind the site.

item.title: How to Log AC Telemetry and Send It to a Friend
item.description: How I helped tune a remote Assetto Corsa setup by logging telemetry, exporting the data, and reviewing it off-site.

item.title: Why Assetto Corsa Was Running at 47 FPS (And How I Fixed It)
item.description: A full Assetto Corsa performance audit covering the exact settings and fixes that pulled my rig out of a 47 FPS mess.

item.title: How I Migrated My Website to a Raspberry Pi 3
item.description: The full Raspberry Pi 3 migration for STRIXEVO, including every command, problem, and fix from the move.

item.title: Windows 10 Gaming Optimizations That Actually Matter
item.description: The Windows 10 gaming optimizations I actually use, without placebo tweaks, registry voodoo, or filler.

item.title: Day One - The Build Log
item.description: The full first-day build log for STRIXEVO, from blank files to a live hardened self-hosted website.

item.title: From FiveM Dev to Self-Hosted Website in a Day
item.description: What carried over from FiveM development, what did not, and how I went from no web background to a live self-hosted site in a day.

item.title: The Pi That's Been Sitting in My Drawer for Months
item.description: Why STRIXEVO is moving off the gaming PC and onto a Raspberry Pi 3 for quieter, lower-power 24/7 hosting.

item.title: The Origin Story
item.description: How gaming, PC building, sim racing, and too much spare time turned into STRIXEVO.

item.title: How I Set Up My Self-Hosted Website From Scratch
item.description: How I built and self-hosted STRIXEVO from scratch with nginx, Cloudflare Tunnel, and my own hardware.
